title: Gear Aid Tenacious Tape Max Flex Patches Clear Stretch UV Resistant Outdoor Rec
description:
Fixing heavy-duty tears on outdoor fabric and vinyl furniture has never been easier with Tenacious Tape Flex Patches. It’s a durable, vinyl repair tape that won’t puncture or peel. This patch kit includes two patches that are weatherproof and resistant to abrasion. The super aggressive adhesive provides a permanent bond and sticks on to almost any dry surface. As a clear, strong tape with an airtight and watertight seal, it makes an ideal vinyl repair patch for outdoor gear and furniture. When only the toughest will do, reach for Tenacious Tape Flex Patches.

Gear Aid Tenacious Tape Max Flex Patches Clear Stretch UV Resistant Outdoor Rec

Fixing heavy-duty tears on outdoor fabric and vinyl furniture has never been easier with Tenacious Tape Flex Patches. It’s a durable, vinyl repair tape that won’t puncture or peel. This patch kit includes two patches that are weatherproof and resistant to abrasion. The super aggressive adhesive provides a permanent bond and sticks on to almost any dry surface. As a clear, strong tape with an airtight and watertight seal, it makes an ideal vinyl repair patch for outdoor gear and furniture. When only the toughest will do, reach for Tenacious Tape Flex Patches.

Key Features

  • Repair a tear in a PVC inflatable, vinyl furniture seat, air mattress, or other outdoor gear with an ultra-strong, flexible patch
  • Peel-and-stick to make nearly invisible, weatherproof repairs to all types of vinyl and synthetic fabric materials; no sewing or iron on application required
  • Use this heavy-duty patch, which stretches and flexes with fabric; resistant to punctures for a permanent repair you can count on
  • Bring this repair kit in your pack; includes two 3” x 5” clear, pre-cut patches and backed by a strong adhesive
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 10800
  • UPC: 21563108002
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 3 in x 5 in
